_comment: PRECRIME scoring policy. Single source of truth. Loaded by mcp_server.js at startup. Edit numbers, weights, regex patterns, and gate rules here -- the JS only evaluates what's defined in this file. After editing, restart the MCP server.

factlet._comment: Factlet-multiplier and dossier-scoring constants used by both booking and client target scoring.

client._comment: Client target scoring (no booking bound) -- feeds score_client and link_factlet.

booking._comment: Booking readiness policy -- feeds score_booking and computeBookingTargetScore. Hard gates are absolute. shareReady requires ALL conditions in gates.shareReady to evaluate true.

gates._comment: Declarative gate rules. Each rule: {field, op, value}. ops: '>=', '===', 'present'. Gate passes when ALL rules pass.

date._comment: Tiered by event window span in days. addLeed requires st and et.

location._comment: Tiered by address specificity. addLeed requires lc (full address). Regex patterns are case-insensitive.

tiers._comment: streetAndVenue = 'CSUN MatArena, 18111 Nordhoff St'. bareCity = 'Los Angeles' + zip, not vendor-actionable.

contact._comment: Generic email prefixes always score 0 regardless of name. Uses booking.genericEmailPrefixes list.

description._comment: Word-count threshold. Description is not a hard gate.

time._comment: startTime OR duration > 0 awards the points. Not a hard gate but useful to a vendor.
